Another app that doesn't understand the concept of consent. If you try to decline the privacy invading Wi-Fi scanning, the app locks you in a permanent loop of asking to enable it. The app worked just fine without this "feature", but if this is what we are doing, I simply won't give this company my business.

App makes ordering and picking up so easy, but the app itself is buggy, unresponsive, unrefined. Every time I open the app I get 3 pop ups telling me not to use it while driving, the initial promotion card takes forever to be able to clear off my screen before I can use the app. So many modal windows pop up but are painfully slow to respond to button presses dismissing them. So many times I have a craving and want to check the app to see my offers but the constant bombardment of unresponsive messages often just makes me quit the app. There is no option to disable promotional push notifications, only the iOS option to turn off all app notifications which I don’t want because I want order update notifications. For a while my app wouldn’t work at all, every time I’d place an order it would then instantly say that my order was refunded. I gave up ordering McDonald’s for months as a result and it turned out the issue was that my payment method was Amex. I don’t know if it was location based and my local McDonald’s suddenly stopped accepting Amex but there was absolutely no error messaging to indicate what the issue was. That was back when my Amex was loaded into my account in app itself, but even to this day you can technically try to pay with Amex via Apple Pay (it’s my default card) and it will still let you submit the order and then cancel it right after. Terrible user flow. There’s no excuse for a global giant company like McDonald’s to have such an unoptimized iOS app in 2026.

I AM BROKE AND LOST ALL MY POINTS. I needed those for the odd breakfast to help get through the month but screw me for using an IPhone.  God forbid we have any control over how we access anything anymore.

As title says, my code has been coming up as invalid at the restaurant for a few weeks. Tried refreshing and waiting for new codes
Only thing worse than the deals is the UI and time it takes to load

I placed an online order through the app and prepaid as required.  Got to the restaurant, checked in, and waited 30 minutes.  Finally got in the drive through and was advised the store never received my order and I would have to place a new order and pay again.  I was advised to cancel the order within the app, but when I did, the app claimed I already received my order.  I double checked with the store multiple times to ensure it was the correct location and even handed them my phone to prove I had already paid.  In the end, I refused to leave the drive through until I received my food, “for free” according to the manager, and still only received a partial order.  When I tried to follow up within the app, there is nothing more than a random phone number listed.  Shame on you McDonalds.

What a bloated, useless mess. Terrible “offers” which are locked to delivery OR pickup, not both. Also they force PRECISE location to get the offers, despite it being completely irrelevant, especially seeing as they don’t even start making your order until you arrive at the “restaurant”. And if you’re getting delivery…seriously, what? 

The deals themselves are abysmal and there are the points that expire before you can use them unless you’re a walking heart attack waiting to happen. For a place with such absurd pricing for their bottom tier “product”, you’d think they’d at least try and incentivize you with tempting deals, but they can’t even do that. Deleted. 

Just more confirmation of why it’s so easy to disregard the nostalgia cravings that lead to McDonald’s. When I can get better “product” at better prices, why would I ever use this app or even eat this junk again unless it’s 3am and my standards and intellectual coherence are on the floor? McDonald’s is very clearly on a slow march into obscurity and irrelevance and I’m thoroughly enjoying it. Reap what you sow and all that.

In summary, this app represents McDonald’s perfectly, bottom tier app for bottom tier fast “product” for the bottom tier of humanity.
This app is slow and has an insane file size considering what it does. I’d give it a pass if it were some small company but come on.
The offers tab is broken. This app is becoming a lag fest! Skipping the ordering there a few times since i can’t have offers. It’s not like there’s other fastfood restaurant
Very slow and laggy. Definitely needs updates
Need an option for customizing coffee separately when ordering multiples.
Le côté livraison de l’appli ainsi que les statut de livraison ne sont qu’en anglais.

I think this app is awful. It’s slow, laggy, and I’ve had so many errors. I also think it’s frustrating that there are so many pop-ups. Really, you need to tell me not to text and drive? Show some respect to your users and stop showing them so many pop-up screens and advertisements. This app should be fast every time it opens. Even scrolling a list of burgers it’s laggy and this is a brand new phone. McDonald’s, seriously, you can do better.

With the 1st version you could choose to pickup at the counter or the drive through up to the last minute. Then lately, even if I choose the drive through, it changes to counter as I approach the restaurant. Why???? I just hope this feature got removed.
Add gluten free oreo mcflurry so my friend can enjoy
The McDonald’s app is a perfect fast food app that you can collect lots of points on and you can easily scan your code!! So as the title goes I LOVE IT!!!!!!!
It takes forever to load and sometimes promotions comes on screen and one can’t even cancel them out and have to restart the app all over again. I hate the app is so slow and unresponsive.
The lag makes me not even wanna eat

Constant problems with this app. Never ever works smoothly. Now it just tells me every restaurant is closed and can’t order from any of them. I’ve deleted the app, looked for updates and it still doesn’t work.

Please update app so that it could be faster. It could load the coupons quicker. The codes can just be added to Apple wallet and it doesn’t have to be selected on location. The reward system is good, but the app is so slow. It’s difficult to pull up in a rush.
The burgers are fake. Definitely missing people on every bite you eat. Don’t eat here. Pay 4 dollars more and go get real food.

This App is the worst. Over the last year I have dealt with the white screen of death (every day ordering a coffee before work), the App erasing my favourite restaurant locations, App lagging and lagging, then it tells me the item I’m ordering is unavailable at this time (8:30am), then sometimes it says I have a weak internet connection (definitely not with 4 bars and on the 5G), and I have done everything that customer service always tells you to do when troubleshooting. Nope. Fire the coders for this App.
Takes a solid 3-4 business days to load up anything
Best fast food
I order a mcveggie, they send me a mc chicken. Happened twice within 1 week. They only refund the food and not the delivery fee. Total scam
Order is convenient but what’s the point of having an app that you can buy food from and not give you a digital receipt, you have to go in store to get it, simply pathetic….

This is an incredibly poorly designed app. When you open the app, it’s incredibly slow, but the first question asked at the drive through is, “what is your code?” There’s just not enough time to get your code ready. Usually, when you open the app, there are popups that inexplicably open multiple times, and you have to close them repeatedly. When you finally have your code ready, it really doesn’t matter, because the code doesn’t work anyway. It’s been this way for a few months now. I’ve stopped using the app altogether.
This app has been hot garbage for a few months now. Always says “code invalid” when trying to order at drive thru

This app has been trash for months/years. Constant lagging and getting stuck on pages without being able to proceed, it has ordered things that weren’t on my screen more than once (usually due to the app crashing/having to restart the app), and it is just slow to get through the menus. You’d figure that this app has existed for years now and the want their customers to use it more, but they’ve dive little to nothing to improve the user experience during that time
Love it!!
I’ve reloaded, deleted, re downloaded, and the app DOSENT WORK. it never recognizes my code for the past two months. Fix your app or make physical cards for rewards!!!

Floods with repeated “don’t text and drive” messages that won’t clear. Ads that won’t clear. Now, my location won’t update. I select for pickup, it moves into ordering, check again, wrong address. Change location, doesn’t update.

This app is awful. I used to use it all the time. Now, i have a bunch of built up points but can’t redeem anything free because if i try im told it’s an invalid code. I’m always told to regenerate a new number but I’ll refresh the app, delete the item and readd, but nothing gives me a new number. I’ve deleted and redownloaded. I’m always given an “invalid code” 
The employees never care either, i try explain it hasn’t been working and they ignore me and shove the debit machine in my face. I’m done supporting a company that just simply doesn’t care

I appreciate the app and connectivity to orders, monopoly etc. however the app has been the worst experience for the better part of 6 months now. Freezing, unable to load pages, stuck in a loop for payment, stuck on promotion pages when first open. Please clean this up.

UI is not intuitive, app lags like no other app on the planet, gives you a notification not to text and drive, you tap ok and nothing happens, the app appears frozen for 30 seconds. Then, once the app is responding, you put in your order and pay, you show up to the drive thru and then don’t have your order.  For a company that prides themselves on efficiency this app is a major bust.
I can’t log in the McDonald’s and every time I just want to see the menu, I have to pick a fast food place and either order pick up or Mcdelivery. This should be at the end you order not the start

Its so hard to navigate. It lags. It automatically makes choices on my behalf that cant be undone. Half the time i just go elsewhere to avoid ordering. Deals arent worth anything

Deleted after use!
App is so slow, even just clicking one button takes so much of my effort. Please get someone to test your app.

Perfectly functioning cards constantly not working exclusively with this app.

Slowest app I’ve ever seen. Not sure why, even with updates.

I really wanted to like this app, but damn, they make it so difficult to do so. Why the heck are there so many steps involved in simply “re-ordering” a simple coffee? Why so many pages does one have to go through, why are there so many steps needed? Why so many questions that need to be answered? Come on, stop with making us go through so many steps to simply order a single coffee.

New change for the app is that you have to select the pickup method at the time of order.    If you wanted to change after the order is placed, then that is not possible and the payment is automatically charged.  Bring back the feature where the custom can select how to pick up the order when they arrive at the restaurant.

I just came back from traveling across the U.S., Latin America, and Europe, and I was surprised to find that the burgers at Montreal are noticeably smaller. Not only the patty, but even the bun seems smaller compared to what I’ve had in other countries. The size difference is quite noticeable.

Depuis plus de six mois, je n’arrive pas à me connecter sur mon application McDonald’s Canada, j’ai perdu mes points et lorsque je tente de me connecter, cela me dit qu’ils ont des problèmes. Lorsque je veux trouver un restaurant McDonald près de chez moi, cela me montre l’Amérique et la roue tourne sans cesse.
Donc l’application est inutilisable pour moi, malgré que j’ai fait la mise à jour

Pour vrai, quand allez-vous permettre l’ajout de cartes-cadeaux à votre application?  Vous êtes l’une des multinationales les plus prospères et les plus fortunées et vous n’êtes pas foutue d’avoir une application permettant d’ajouter ses propres cartes-cadeaux. J’ai l’application de tous les restaurants possibles et vous êtes la seule qui n’offre pas la possibilité. C’est ridiculement aberrant et extrêmement décevant venant de vous.
The app is slow

Sometimes you just want your code ready when ordering in store, but the app takes forever to load. It throws up an ad page that wastes your time, and then shows alerts telling you not to use the app while driving—even if you’re just walking.

When I place an order and then select “I’m already here” when I arrive at McDonald’s , it tells me I’m at the wrong location even when I’m at the correct one,  and won’t show me my order number. Whenever I try to order online for pick up it always tells me there is an issue with payment. And yes,  I have uninstalled, reinstalled, changed my payment card and deleted my account multiple times. It works once and then I continue to get the same error.
They are so concerned about trying to upsell you impacting the app performance.  Truly one of the worst coded apps out there.
